papers_mined.title: Pygmy music (Wikipedia)
papers_mined.note: Mbuti/Twa/Aka/Baka Congo rainforest vocal polyphony with HOCKET technique (rapid alternation of single notes between singers); yodel chest/head alternation; ostinato cyclic meters.

papers_mined.title: Pygmy Music Melodigging
papers_mined.note: Multiple independent melodic lines interlock via hocket + yodel + echo-like repetitions producing dense harmonic textures.

papers_mined.title: Pygmy Yodels Introduction Mademoiselle Montana
papers_mined.note: Hocket = rapid alternation of notes between singers — defining acoustic technique.

papers_mined.title: Elephant Hunting Song Mbuti Matheson Trust
papers_mined.note: Communal participation hocket-style polyphony documented in Mbuti elephant-hunting song.
